_comment: xfrm.elementMove preset path: same translate-with-element-falloff scenario as element_translate_analytical, but driven through the preset (which auto-wires falloff.type=element + ACEN/AXIS=Element). Pick centre at the (+0.5,+0.5,+0.5) corner with radius 0.5 — only that vert moves +0.3 along X. modo_method=analytical because MODO's `ElementMove` preset requires interactive click-to-pick + xfrm.transform doApply that's untested headlessly.
